title: calochortus exilis
intro: Calochortus exilis, also known as the Goldback Mariposa Lily, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its chemical composition, including alkaloids and saponins. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and promoting wound healing. The Goldback Mariposa Lily can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
